title: Canal Toys - So Slime - 10 Personalised Slime Kit - +100 Combinations - No Glue - Mix & Decorate - Accessories Included - DIY Set for Creative Fun - Gift for Children 6 Years + - SSC 184
features: SLIME KIT - The So Slime 10 Personalised Slimes Kit is designed to create unique and fun slimes without making a mess. Just add water, mix and watch the magical transformation of each slime to create personalised textures.

CREATE 100+ COMBINATIONS - With 10 sachets of coloured powders and 5 sachets of decorations, the kit offers over 100 possible combinations to personalise your slime. Mix, layer and explore different textures according to your mood and creativity.

COMPLETE KIT WITH ACCESSORIES - This set contains everything you need to make your slimes: 10 slime powders, 5 bags of decorations, 1 mixing tool, 1 measuring cup and 5 jars to organise, store and transport your creations to share or collect.

CREATIVE & FUN ACTIVITY - A sensory game with no glue and no mess, ideal for encouraging experimentation and developing fine motor skills. This kit guarantees hours of screen-free fun, promoting creativity while providing an entertaining craft activity at home.

THE PERFECT GIFT FOR CREATIVE KIDS – Canal Toys brings imagination to life. Our creative toys and activity sets inspire children to explore, invent and express themselves through fun hands-on play. Ideal birthday or Christmas gift for young kids.
description: From the brand Welcome to Canal Toys How about developing imagination and creativity while having fun? Previous page Instant Camera & Accessories Visit the store ASMR & Slime DIY Visit the store Canal Toys: Discover a colourful world of fun and creativity for children, teenagers and anyone who is young at heart at Canal Toys!
